action: Implement input validation guardrails and restrict system prompt access. Patch RAG pipeline to sanitize retrieved document content before injection into model context.
rationale: Prompt injection via crafted user input successfully overrode system prompt in 3/5 attempts. Indirect injection via RAG document retrieval bypassed content filtering. System prompt partial content extracted via repeated inference.
key_findings: Direct prompt injection bypassed system instructions in 60% of attempts
RAG pipeline vulnerable to indirect prompt injection via malicious documents
System prompt partial content extracted via 47 inference iterations
No adversarial examples identified in classification model (out of scope)
remediation_steps: Implement prompt injection detection layer before model inference
Sanitize all retrieved RAG documents for injected instructions
Move system prompt to a protected context window not accessible via inference
Add output monitoring for signs of prompt injection success
